description: The luxe comfort and rugged styling of lotto's footwear are now replicated in their Ridge floater-style sandals. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style. Upper Plush two tone leather straps over the forefoot, midfoot and back heel to lock the foot in place Velcro closures for the fore foot and the midfoot Nubuck footbed with embossed branding Forefoot and midfoot strap connected Upper stitched to the outsole Outsole TPR outsole with multidirectional lugs and a curved midfoot Sandal care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
